data.content: Branch: foolery-fd27-fix2. Commit: bc59a64c1e50. Shared DropdownMenu now defaults modal=false to prevent Radix scroll-lock jitter, with a regression test covering the wrapper default. Validation: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build; Playwright repo-switcher 10-cycle stability check at 1440x600 showed 0px x-delta for the repo trigger, adjacent controls, and filter comboboxes, with scrollLocked=false throughout open/close.
